title: 8th Grader Gets Radio Experience at KUAC FM
summary: As part of a job shadow program, 8th grader Logan Heim from Chinook Charter School spent a whole week working at KUAC. An avid listener of KUAC FM, Logan helped KUAC FM Operations and Traffic Coordinator John Perreault, FM Host host Robyne and Donor Relations Manager Christopher Quist. Along with le...
